findings.description: The signature block is duplicated: 'Sincerely,' and 'Judith A. Wehner / Assistant State Mining Specialist' appear both as embedded text in the signature image AND as separate HTML text, creating a reading-order disruption with redundant content.
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 shows 'Sincerely,' once, then the handwritten signature, then 'Judith A. Wehner / Assistant State Mining Specialist' once. The HTML renders 'Sincerely,' as standalone text, then a signature image containing 'Sincerely,' plus the name/title, then repeats 'Judith A. Wehner' and 'Assistant State Mining Specialist' as separate text elements.
